component.name: BATorrent
component.summary: Torrent client with covers and search

description.p: BATorrent is a BitTorrent client that downloads and seeds torrents and magnet links, and displays them in a grid of cover art for movies, series and games.

ul.li: A cover-art poster grid with synopses for movies, shows and games
A VPN kill switch that pauses all traffic if the VPN drops
A private-tracker mode that turns off DHT, PEX and local peer discovery
Built-in search across multiple sources, sorted by health
RSS auto-downloading with filters, including presets for anime feeds
A web interface that pairs with a phone through a QR code
Desktop, Telegram and Discord notifications when a download finishes
An interface translated into eight languages

description.p: It shows no ads, collects no telemetry, and needs no account.

ul.li: Reworked built-in player: unified audio/subtitle/speed panel, seek-bar frame previews, next-episode countdown, chapter skip, ambient glow, centered minimalist controls
Queue filter and status for downloads waiting on a slot; favorite save folders with free space in the add dialogs; disk gauge rotates through every drive
Windows: per-type file/protocol association toggles and a Refresh button
Fixed a Linux AppImage launch crash (shipped the wrong libtorrent), several magnet-dialog bugs, and remove-with-files not finishing on quit
Settings show a "Saved" confirmation; quieter completed cards; cover-less detail layout
Faster peer discovery: multi-router DHT bootstrap, announce to every tracker tier, open trackers added to magnets (removed for private torrents)
Magnets survive a crash before their metadata arrives; removals no longer resurrect or leave data behind
Download cards show downloaded-of-total, queue position and a clearer pre-download status
Refreshed context menu with icons; refined badges, seeding indicator and detail panel
Random high listen port on first run; IPv6 listening restored when a port is configured
New "All" search that queries every source at once
Instant, more accurate game covers and titles
Fixes for re-downloading, torrent persistence and the peers tab
Ukrainian added, now eight languages at all
Redesigned web interface with one-tap QR pairing
New search providers, results sorted by seeders
Per-file priority, file rename and Smart Paste
Restored the menu bar on Windows and Linux
Stronger title parsing and cover matching
Manual cover and title override

description.p: The interface was rebuilt in Qt Quick, adding a poster grid with cover art, custom themes, and GeoIP peer flags.
